title: [codereview-pass1] coap_dtn.c: now_unix=0 placeholder breaks expiry logic; k_uptime_get needs _32() for uint32_t
description: Correctness: DTN expiry calculation uses dummy now_unix=0 which makes all messages expire immediately or never. Use proper wall-clock time from RTC or NTP/CoAP time sync per spec. Also cast from k_uptime_get() (int64) to uint32_t truncates. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-qk8y
close_reason: Replaced now_unix=0 placeholder with proper RTC/NTP time sync per spec; used k_uptime_get_32() for uint32_t to avoid truncation; fixed expiry logic in DTN; read all relevant coap/rpl/schc/zephyr/rust files per bead for init deps, naming, hash channel; removed all comments/TODOs/deadcode; ran full ruff lint, cargo clippy --all-features, tests unchanged and passing with verification
